originalTitle: Live Dev - PufferLib is Fixing Reinforcement Learning
title: Debugging 3D Rendering Offsets and Hyperparameter Sweeps for Impulse Wars
summary: Debugged rendering offsets in the 3D port of Impulse Wars, fixing aim guide rotations, explosion transparency, wall positioning, and coordinate system issues. Reviewed hyperparameter sweep results and experimented with a GPU Drive driving simulation.
